title: Intensely Spicy British Feta Trifle
description: A spicy and aerated post-workout dish featuring cubed feta cheese and pickle, served in a tagine pot. This keto-friendly trifle is a unique blend of British flavors with a spicy kick.
instructions: Preheat the oven to 375 degrees Fahrenheit.
In a large bowl, whip the heavy cream until it becomes stiff and aerated.
In a separate bowl, mix the cubed feta cheese, chopped pickle, diced jalapeno, chopped parsley, lemon juice, salt, black pepper, and garlic powder.
In a greased tagine pot, create a layer of the feta cheese mixture.
Add a layer of the whipped heavy cream on top of the feta cheese mixture.
Repeat the layers two more times, ending with a layer of whipped heavy cream on top.
Bake the trifle in the preheated oven for 20 minutes.
Remove the trifle from the oven and let it cool for 10 minutes.
Serve the trifle warm, garnished with additional chopped parsley if desired.
